description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open-plan design, including multiple interconnected rooms and large open spaces. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with sections of glass windows and doors providing natural light throughout the structure. A spacious patio area with a pergola and a rectangular swimming pool is visible, suggesting a focus on outdoor living and recreation. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary architectural style, and the property is enclosed by low boundary walls. The interior appears to include a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, with visible furniture and fixtures. Landscaping elements such as green patches and paved walkways enhance the overall aesthetic and functionality of the property.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan interior, large windows, a patio with pergola, and a swimming pool, surrounded by low walls and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the swimming pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio with pergola, swimming pool, and access to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional green spaces, the flat roof, and the overall length of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
